# Vital Core Accept Prompt

Use this acceptance mode before merge.

## Acceptance checklist

- Objective met and acceptance criteria satisfied.
- Accessibility evidence quality maintained (URL, locator, snippet, rule id, severity, WCAG mapping).
- Output artifacts are deterministic and machine-readable.
- Discovery/reporting behavior changes are test-covered.
- CI and workflow guardrails pass.

## Required summary

Provide:
1. What changed.
2. Evidence from validation commands.
3. Residual risks and follow-up items.
4. Explicit go/no-go recommendation.
